channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Super Furry Animals Reunite For First Show In A Decade
item.description: Guess who's back, back again! Super Furry Animals are reuniting for a legendary show 🌟🎶 Let's dance like it's 2001!

item.title: Jared Mattson (The Mattson 2) & Ruban Nielson (Unknown Mortal Orchestra) Announce New Collaborative Album FEAR: Hear “AMERICAN EAGLE”
item.description: 🎶 New collab alert! @themattson2 x @UMO dropping album FEAR with 🔥 single "AMERICAN EAGLE"! Check it out now! 🦅 #musicnews #collaboration

item.title: Win Two Tickets to Blu DeTiger’s Sold Out Live at Lagunitas Concert
item.description: 🎶 Feel the funk at Blu DeTiger's SOLD OUT show! 🎸 Want to be there? Stay tuned for your chance to win 2 tickets! 🎟️ #livemusic #giveaway

item.title: Mary J. Blige Extends Las Vegas Residency with 10 New Dates
item.description: 🎉 Vegas, baby! Mary J. Blige is blessing us with 10 more nights of pure soul vibes! Who's ready to groove? 🎶✨ #MaryJBlige #VegasResidency

item.title: Beastie Boys’ Mike D Announces Rare Shows in NYC and Los Angeles
item.description: 🎤 Get ready to party with Beastie Boys' Mike D in NYC and LA! Who's joining the hip-hop legends? 🎉 #BeastieBoys #MikeD #LiveMusic
